string 2: You have done well.
You!
You were manipulating Plutomon!{next}
You were manipulating Junomon!{next}
Are you Chronomon's will?{next}
You, my alter ego, hatched from the egg...
You have finally opened the cover of the clock...

This body, bound by the laws of time,
will finally be free at long last.
I have been waiting for this moment.

But I am still but a cog in the machine. Regardless of my own will,
I will eliminate any intruders into the Akashic Records.
That is the curse that binds me.
Now, lay me to rest, and then take my place.

If you do not, you will rot here in obscurity.
A punishment for tampering with the laws of time.

Fight me, my alter ego.
Grant me true freedom at last!

So, that's Chronomon...
The one who created Aegiomon...

It looked like he was released from his seal...
We must've helped open the cover of the clock.

But now that the world is in this mess, we have to fight.
There's no way out of this without settling things.

The future won't come if we stand still...
Time has to move forward!

I've been in a daze ever since I woke up...
...but my head's finally clearing.
It was kind of faint, but I saw you and {player} fighting.
You became one... I wasn't dreaming, was I?

No, you weren't. {player} and I are... well...
Does it come as a shock?

Yeah... I'm not quite sure what to say...
It doesn't make any sense...

I don't know what comes next, either. But... I'm going to
keep that promise I made, no matter what.

...no matter how crazy the world gets,
I'll be right there with you, Inori.
With this sword... I can cut through space.
{player}, I'm glad you're okay!
Where are we...?{next}

We're on Ceresmon's back.
Sirenmon has returned, in her Digivolved form.

We're circling around the Akashic Records,
and Chronomon's right over there.
It seems like everyone is ready for the final battle.
We better prepare ourselves, too...
Aegiomon, wait.

I know you said you'd do something
about all of this earlier.

What did you mean by that?
It really has me worried...

A battle between two who have the power of time...
...really messes up the fabric of our world.
Someone has to clean up the mess.
What do you mean by "clean up"?
Inori, I need you to trust me, no matter what.

I have, and always will, love you...
...even if the world changes.

Please, everyone, lend me your strength...
...to move forward into the future!

These tedious gnats flitting about my gaze...
Did they offer you their aid in your darkest moment?

Did you think that if you stood together, you had a chance
at defeating me? Well, I shall shatter that hope now...!

Taking your power away will be as easy as
smashing an ant.

There are things that cannot be changed. Acknowledge the
heartless unreason of the world and be forlorn of hope!

I was born from Chronomon... so that means
I should have the same power in my body...

If I use that power to interfere with the laws of time...
I might be able to restore everyone to their original state.
I see. I like the sound of that.
We'll lend you a hand...!
Yaaaaaaah!
Haaaaaaah!

I made you two push yourselves too hard...
...all because I'm such a terrible sister.

I'm sorry I couldn't keep fighting until the
very end, Minnie...
Dammit... I'm all burnt out. Sorry, Nervy...

I'm so proud of you both.
Don't worry, I'll take it from here.
We entrust the rest of our strength to you, Minnie...
...Hmm?
Look up there!
This is... a special exception.

A traitor, protected by the laws of nature... cannot be
engaged by those who also live under the laws of nature.
In such a case...

...Someone who exists outside of such laws
must punish the traitor.

Can we drop the chitchat?
Aren't we pressed for time?

Right... Interference is being allowed...
...just this one time... from outside...

...by the Current's power...
Oh, I'm getting sleepy again...

We've got to finish this before Homeros falls asleep.
We're counting on you.
Graaaaaaaaaaagh!
Thank you.
Pathetic...!

And after my siblings showed such strength...
Is this really the best I can do...?
Ahaha... Hahaha...!
I'm pathetic... I'm such a disgrace...
But this is exactly what I wanted to feel...!

I volunteered to go to the human world because
everything just felt so unsatisfying...!
I'm grateful...
You've lit a fire in me... one that I've been looking for!
I'll show you what I can really do...!

I'm sorry, everyone. The world will probably
change after this...
...but we still have to move forward!
Inori... If something happens to me...
...don't forget me, okay?
Of course I wouldn't forget you. How could I?
When I fell into that hole, it was like I was in a dream.
It was so dark and lonely.

But I could hear a voice. It was your voice,
Aegiomon, calling to me.

I could never forget the voice that saved me
from that loneliness.

Even if time gets messed up and the world
changes form...

...if you're ever born into the world again,
I'll be the first to come find you.
That's a promise!
Thank you, Inori.
Hearing you say that...

...made it all worth it.
I'm so glad I was born into this world.
Urgh... Well done, my alter... ego...

You have broken the chains... the shackles of
natural law which imprison this body...
Long, at last...
...I feel... free.
Yes... This is it...
My true desire...
...Freedom.
*gulp* Oh...!
Ungh... Agh... Gah!
Oh, no!

Now that the Keeper is gone...
...the fabric of time is starting to unravel...!
I was born... from Chronomon...
Hnh... Agh...
...so I understand. I can hear it...
...the words... "thank you."
Oh!

Just as Chronomon wished...
...the Keeper of Time is now no more.
What will happen... to the world now?

If things keep going, the damage will be worse than the
Shinjuku Inferno. Actually... it's already happening.
Whew...
Aegiomon...
Nhn... *whimpering*
Ah, Inori... So you've realized already...
Ngh... Whew...!
There is a way to fix everything.

A way to restore a world that has lost
its Keeper of Time.

I must... take on that role myself,
in Chronomon's place.
And I have the power to do so...

...even if I am bound by the chains of
natural laws.
A cog... in the machine...?
Yes.

That is what Chronomon planned
all along—the very reason I was born.

Maybe... the higher being heard
Chronomon's wish, and accepted it.

That's why... {player} appeared,
dressed like an anime character.
*whimpering*
To lead us to this future... our one and only future.
*gasping*
No...
*whimpering*
Don't do this to me, Aegiomon...!
*gasping*
Don't leave me like this...!
*panting* Nnngh...
Nnnnngh...

I don't want to lose anyone anymore...
I'm sick of it...
Ngh... *sobbing*
Don't cry, Inori.
Time exists everywhere in the world.
In other words...
*whimpering* Ungh... *sobbing*
...I will always be by your side.
So this probably... isn't such a bad thing.
I... will always be watching over you.
I will always be praying for your happiness.
*sobbing* *gasping*
And, finally... thank you, Inori.
Ngh... *sniff* Ungh...
On that day, at that place...
...for finding me when I had just hatched.
I can... handle the rest by myself.

In the next world, I'll make sure that
the "gate" doesn't open.

That'll make it so the war never happened. So then,
all the things she lost should be back to normal.

Of course, it'll also make it so we'll never meet...
...but as long as she's happy, I'm okay with that.
Inori will be somewhere in the world.

As long as I can feel that... I can get through
an eternity or two.
But...
...at the very least...
...I want you to watch over her closely.

I know it's selfish of me to ask, but you...
...you definitely understand how I feel, right?
Because, after all...
...you are the other me.
This was a tale of two worlds...
...the world of humans, and the world of Digimon.

As a result of the two worlds converging,
Aegiomon met a human girl.

By living among the humans, he learned of their
kindness, and formed a deep bond with them.

But meanwhile, Chronomon was sowing the seeds of chaos
that would guide the world to certain destruction.

Aegiomon learned of his destiny—to become the Great Guardian—
and rose up to face the challenge of protecting the world.

However, during a battle, the girl disappeared
into the aether.

To rescue his companion, Aegiomon awakened
the power over time that lay dormant within him.

But in a tragic chain of events, he lost control over his power and set
the world on a path to ruin, all according to Chronomon's machinations.

Aegiomon fell into a deep despair, from his failure to save
his partner and from causing the destruction of the world.

But fortune smiled upon the Great Guardian,
and offered him another chance.

This time, Aegiomon used his mastery over time unselfishly,
and changed the tragic fate of Iliad's champions.

Together the twelve warriors awaken their true powers as Iliad's
protectors, found the girl, and vanquished Chronomon once and for all.

However, even his demise at the hands of the Olympos XII
was part of Chronomon's grand design.

"I will take the place of the Keeper of Time."
Despite knowing what that would entail, Aegiomon was resolute.

He wished for the girl's happiness, and sought to
return everything she had ever lost to her.
By offering the time they spent together as a cost...

The gate connecting the two worlds had closed,
once again separating them.

Though his partner was now a world apart, Aegiomon would
continue to watch over her, forever, as he promised...
